feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Setup for Single Product with Multiple Machine Configurations
entry.content: "We have a single product that is produced on two separate machines, Machine A and Machine B, which have different configurations. Machine A is equipped with 4 filling nozzles, while Machine B is equipped with 16 filling nozzles. The production process and resource utilization, including labor and machine hours, vary depending on the machine used. I would like to know how to configure SAP to accommodate this variability in production and accurately capture the differences in labor and machine hours consumed on each machine."

entry.title: In Migo can someone kindly advise which movement code I need to for transit stock to unrestricted?
entry.content: Can someone kindly advise me on which movement code I need for moving materials from transit stock to unrestricted stock in Migo?

entry.title: HANA update to revision 81
entry.content:
Current environment:
OS :suse15sp2
DB :PERSON_NAME IP_ADDRESS
Target environment for upgrade:
OS :suse15sp6
DB :PERSON_NAME 2.0 revision 81
We want to upgrade the current operating system to suse15sp6, according to DIGITS- SAP PERSON_NAME: Supported Operating Systems， Should I upgrade the database to revision 59.12 first, and then upgrade the database to revision 80 after the OS is upgraded to suse15sp6.

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A:

Q: When did the issue last occur (MMM,DD, YYYY)
A:


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP MDG: For Change CR Type - while changing any field data Error Message to be perform
entry.content:
Hi

For Change CR Type - soon after clicking on edit on Change Request & if any of the field getting change, error message should get display.

How to perform this for above, Like how to get the changed fields data before submit of CR ? 
From my side tried several methods to get, but nothing worked.

Thanks & Regards, 
Sandeep Suggu.
(SAP MDG Consultant)

SAP Master Data Governance SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: CDS Views during upgrade
entry.content: Is it possible to overlook CDS view activation errors during the ACT_UPG phase of SUM? CDS views are built on top of the DDIC so should be treated as Development objects and not DDIC objects. We have encountered various errors related to Cds views in this SUM phase and think that the shadow client is not the correct place to fix these items. If you have any experience with SAP upgrades and have encountered such issues please let me know your views.

entry.title: Split batch, Picking and PGI using single IDOC (SHPCON) for Outbound delivery
entry.content: I want to batch split items, pick, pack, and perform PGI in a single IDOC (SHPCON). At present, I am unable to do so in a single IDOC. However, I can perform a batch split in one IDOC using the segment E1EDL18-QUAF = 'CHG', and in another IDOC, I can handle picking, packing, and PGI using the segments E1EDL18-QUAF = 'PIC' and E1EDL18-QUAF = 'PGI', but not all in a single IDOC. Need some urgent help.

entry.title: How to implement additional booking periods (More than 12) in SAC and Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are currently working on a reporting using SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere with data coming from S/4HANA. 

In S/4HANA it is possible to work with additional booking periods (More than the typical 12 month booking periods). We have the requirement to report these additional booking periods using SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere. As there is barely any information or blogs regarding this and no standard solution available in SAC/Datasphere, we were wondering if someone worked on a similar solution before or if there are any best practices for this kind of implementation.

Any help is much appreciated!

Best regards

entry.title: PY-CA-YE 2024 Tax forms should NOT contain /317 in QPP Base amount boxes B02 and B17
entry.content:
PY-CA-YE 2024 Tax forms should not contain /317 in Base amount boxes

Wage type apps R124 and T424 are affected. Hydro Quebec has removed /317 from the noted boxes. This message is to advise SAP of this need and ensure further Notes do not add this wage type back in.

The RL1 guide states only the base amount and the first additional QPP are to be reported in B02. This first additional amount was defined and described in Notes 3248911 and 3283966. We have validated this with our Tax specialist and provide the attachment for detailed information. Hydro Quebec has removed /317 from the affected boxes to continue testing our year end processing of tax forms.

entry.title: EHS Duplicate Resource Error in Identify Risk app
entry.content: In the Identify Risk app, two risks are created for some chemicals and when we click on them, we get a duplicate resource error. Does anyone have any ideas?

entry.title: Differences in SAP configuration steps required for Build-to-Order (BTO) compared to MTO or ATO?
entry.content:
I have implemented MTO (Make-to-Order) and ATO (Assemble-to-Order). I used planning strategy 20 for MTO and 81/82 for ATO.
I am unsure how BTO (Build-to-Order) differs from ATO or MTO, or if it's the same thing. The key differences I've identified are:
  • MTO is the broadest term, encompassing all production triggered by a customer order.
     
  • BTO emphasizes customization and configuration during the production process.
     
  • ATO involves a combination of pre-production and final assembly based on customer orders.
What different SAP configuration steps are required for BTO? And how do these steps differentiate it from MTO or ATO?

entry.title: Is there a way to eliminate the differences in standard costs when transferred between plants in sap
entry.content:
Is there a way to eliminate the differences in standard costs when transferred between plants in sap? (Not between companies)

(Example)
Plant A manages standard cost of 100 yen, and item plant B manages standard cost of 120 yen. 20 yen difference occurs when transferring items between plants (inventory account 20 / difference account 20).

Since this difference is internal profit, it must be eliminated and returned in the quarter (12/31, inventory account 20/difference account 20, 1/1, inventory account 20/difference account 20).

→If we try to do this in MR21, we need to do it on the same day.

entry.title: Is it possible to do a gross average of materials in SAP with transaction code CKMLCP?
entry.content:
Is it possible to do a gross average of materials in SAP with transaction code CKMLCP?

I believe that CKMLCP is a transaction that can evaluate the total average of products, but I would like to know if it is possible to evaluate the total average of materials including purchase price differences, etc.

entry.title: “Archiving” of the transaction S_ALR_87012089
entry.content:
Hello, 3 months ago, we did an “Archiving” of the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
Note 2353160 indicates that this data can be seen with the SARI transaction.
We need to know how to identify these cases in the SARI transaction.We need to identify how to view the information in “Archiving” with the transaction SARI for the documents of the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
When we view the data of the Object CHANGEDOCU, many modifications appear of all the transactions.Please, we need to identify those that correspond to the transaction S_ALR_87012089.
Can you help us?

entry.title: DRFF - Operator "Contains" missing for House bank master data object
entry.content:
Transaction - DRFF

DRFF - Operator "Contains" available for BAM Master Data. 

DRFF - Operator "Contains" missing for House bank master data object. 

Please find the attached for more information.

entry.title: How to connect sap s4 hana to oracle DB via SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Can i get an update on how to connect sap s4 hana to oracle db via sap btp(BPA)?

The requirement is to use the data from SAP custom reports from s4 hana and push it directly to Oracle DB.

entry.title: When I use F110 the FB data has been creaded with the Account holder is space。
entry.content:
When using Onetime BP and regular BP for automatic payment, the FB data has been creaded  with the Account holder is space。

However, when the proposal was submitted,  Account holder have the value.

Onetime BP and regular BP have the same Account holder。

Can you help me confirm why the value of   Account holder becomes blank。

entry.title: Master Data and Configuration Relationships in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am working on setting up a new company configuration in SAP S/4HANA (version 2021). I want to understand how key master data elements and organizational units are related and what dependencies exist when creating them. Here's a list of the main elements I'm focusing on, along with their relevant database tables:

T000 - Client
T001 - Company Code
TKA01 - Controlling Area
TGSB - Business Area
CEPC - Profit Center
CSKS - Cost Center
PRPS - WBS
T001W - Plant
T001L - Storage Location
T024 - Purchasing Organization
T024E - Purchasing Group
BP001 - Business Partner
How are these entities related hierarchically, and what dependencies should I consider when configuring them?
EX, I know that when creating a Profit Center, it requires a Controlling Area. Similarly, creating a Storage Location requires a Plant.
Are there other dependencies like these I should be aware of?
Can someone provide a text-based ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram) or an example that maps out these relationships in a clear hierarchy?
Note:
If you have suggestions for adding other key master data to this list, please let me know.
Thanks in advance for your guidance!

entry.title: Hi Comunity. I have an issue on an Idoc posting, Error Code KI235 - Account requires an assignment
entry.content:
I have an issue on an Idoc posting, Error Code KI235 - Account requires an assignment.

The path worked for one country but for other it stays into the 51 status with the error message KI235. same idocs do not have any field for cost center and no rule set into OKB9. I do not know where to look further to search what the issue could be on the France country where did not retrieve any CO object since on Spain worked with same logic on create Idoc.

entry.title: Assistance Needed with Substitution for FI Component (Event 0005)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I encountered an issue while attempting to activate Cost of Sales (COS) accounting for a specific company. Below is the path I followed:

Path:
T.Code: SPRO > SAP Reference IMG > Financial Accounting > Financial Accounting Global Settings > Functional Area for Cost of Sales Accounting > Activate Cost of Sales Accounting

After selecting the desired company and marking "Active" in the COS column, I received the following message:
"Substitution for FI component, event 0005 not yet activated."

Could someone please clarify the following points:

  1. What is the "Substitution for FI component, event 0005"?
  2. In which scenarios is it used?
  3. How can I resolve this issue to proceed with activating COS accounting?

I’ve also attached an image for further clarification.

Best regards,
Mostafa Mahmoud

entry.title: STO creation with Quality/Blocked stock type
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to allow intra/intercompany stock transfer from quality stock type. I understand this feature is available in SPM as described in KBA-3390111 but , I came accross another consulting note -3390689 in which it is mentioned that this process will work without errors only of the stock in quality stock type is not linked to an inspection lot for non EWM managed storage location.

My client belong to F&B industry and there it is quite common to have stock moved with the SC network in quality stock type for below reasons:-
1. Quality results usually take time and for that period the stock cannot be stored in factory due to space constraints.

2. in the DC to stock will in quality stock type which ensures this stock is not delivered to customer also stock in quality stock type is considered as available in stock for Supply planning purpose. 

Have you encountered such requirement from your clients and if yes, how have you addressed them.

 

Thanks,

Vinit.
